ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the component on the schematic */,
  "y" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the component on the schematic */,
  "w" INTEGER /* Width of the component */,
  "h" INTEGER /* Height of the component */,
  "pin_count" INTEGER /* Number of pins on the component */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of the component (e.g., resistor, capacitor, IC) */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the component */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the component */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number assigned by the manufacturer */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the component was added to the inventory */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the component information was updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the component */,
  "price" TEXT /* Cost of the component */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the component */,
  "minimum_stock_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level required to trigger a reorder */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the stock level falls below the minimum */,
  "parent_component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent component in a hierarchical relationship (NULL if it's a top-level component) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_pins" (
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pin */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the pin belongs to */,
  "pin_name" TEXT /* Name of the pin */,
  "pin_type" TEXT /* Type of the pin (e.g., input, output, power) */,
  "pin_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the pin */,
  "pin_voltage" TEXT /* Voltage rating of the pin */,
  "pin_current" TEXT /* Current rating of the pin */,
  "pin_resistance" TEXT /* Resistance of the pin */,
  "pin_capacitance" TEXT /* Capacitance of the pin */,
  "pin_inductance" TEXT /* Inductance of the pin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_pins_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schematics" (
  "schematic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schematic */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the schematic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the schematic */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the schematic */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the schematic was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the schematic */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the schematic was last modified */,
  "schematic_status" TEXT /* Current status of the schematic (e.g., draft, approved, in production) */,
  "schematic_type" TEXT /* Type of schematic (e.g., circuit, PCB layout) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the schematic belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schematic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schematics_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schematics_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed and salted) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, engineer, manager) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schematic_components" (
  "schematic_component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instance of a component in a schematic */,
  "schematic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the schematic */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of instances of the component used in the schematic */,
  "x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the component instance on the schematic */,
  "y" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the component instance on the schematic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schematic_component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schematic_components_schematic_id FOREIGN KEY ("schematic_id") REFERENCES schematics ("schematic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schematic_components_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the component */,
  "reserved_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component reserved for upcoming projects or orders */,
  "last_stock_check_date" TEXT /* Date of the last stock check */,
  "last_stock_adjustment_date" TEXT /* Date of the last stock adjustment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_inventory_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production order */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the order is for */,
  "schematic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the schematic being produced */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the schematic to be produced */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the production order (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the order */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the order was created */,
  "expected_completion_date" TEXT /* Expected date of completion */,
  "actual_completion_date" TEXT /* Actual date of completion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_orders_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_orders_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_orders_schematic_id FOREIGN KEY ("schematic_id") REFERENCES schematics ("schematic_id")
)
